meta.notes: Seed product data for skincare and style. Prices are approximate street or online prices in India.

products.name: Simple Refreshing Face Wash
products.bestFor: A gentle daily cleanser when you want clean skin without the tight, stripped feeling.

products.name: Cetaphil Oily Skin Cleanser
products.bestFor: Useful when your face gets greasy fast and harsh face washes keep making things worse.

products.name: Bioderma Sebium Gel Moussant
products.bestFor: A cleaner, more expensive upgrade if oil control and comfort both matter to you.

products.name: Pond's Super Light Gel
products.bestFor: A lightweight moisturizer for hot Indian weather and people who hate sticky cream textures.

products.name: Cetaphil DAM Daily Advance Ultra Hydrating Lotion
products.bestFor: A safe default when your skin needs actual repair and not just a little surface hydration.

products.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream
products.bestFor: For dry or compromised skin when barrier support matters more than fancy claims.

products.name: Aqualogica Glow+ Dewy Sunscreen
products.bestFor: An easier starter sunscreen if you are just trying to build the habit daily.

products.name: Minimalist SPF 50 Sunscreen
products.bestFor: A practical all-round sunscreen that works for a lot of people in Indian weather.

products.name: La Roche-Posay Anthelios UVMune
products.bestFor: A premium pick if you want strong protection and a finish that still feels elegant.

products.name: Minimalist Niacinamide 5%
products.bestFor: A good early serum if your concerns are oil balance, texture, and post-acne marks.

products.name: Deconstruct Vitamin C + Ferulic Serum
products.bestFor: Useful if you want brightness and a little antioxidant support without a very aggressive formula.

products.name: Klairs Freshly Juiced Vitamin Drop
products.bestFor: A slower, gentler premium vitamin C route if you want brightness without rushing the process.

products.name: Beardo Beard and Hair Growth Oil
products.bestFor: For men growing or maintaining a beard who want it to look groomed instead of dry and messy.

products.name: L'Oreal Hyaluron Moisture Shampoo
products.bestFor: A good weekly default when you want cleaner hair without the scalp feeling wrecked.

products.name: Titan Skinn Raw
products.bestFor: An easy men's fragrance recommendation that feels polished without screaming for attention.

capsule.name: White Oxford Shirt
capsule.whyItMatters: This works for office, dinner, family events, and layering without trying too hard.

capsule.name: Light Blue Shirt
capsule.whyItMatters: An easy weekday option that feels more relaxed than white but still clean and sharp.

capsule.name: Well-Fit Black T-Shirt
capsule.whyItMatters: One of the easiest base layers when fit matters more than branding.

capsule.name: Well-Fit White T-Shirt
capsule.whyItMatters: The cleanest starting point for casual outfits if the fabric and fit are right.

capsule.name: Dark Blue Jeans
capsule.whyItMatters: A safer and more versatile default than distressed or overly faded denim.

capsule.name: Beige Chinos
capsule.whyItMatters: These instantly make your wardrobe feel more mature without becoming formal.

capsule.name: Olive Overshirt
capsule.whyItMatters: A simple layer that gives shape to outfits without needing a full jacket.

capsule.name: Navy Polo
capsule.whyItMatters: Useful when you want something neater than a tee but easier than a shirt.

capsule.name: White Sneakers
capsule.whyItMatters: Probably the easiest single shoe to wear across casual outfits.

capsule.name: Brown Loafers
capsule.whyItMatters: These make festive, office, and date-night outfits feel more intentional quickly.

capsule.name: Minimal Watch
capsule.whyItMatters: A simple watch is still one of the easiest ways to look a bit more put together.

capsule.name: Brown Belt
capsule.whyItMatters: Small detail, big difference, especially once your shoes and belt start talking to each other.
